description_long: This is a modern convertible sofa bed with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features two loose back cushions and a seat that extends outward to form a flat sleeping surface, effectively transforming it into a bed. The armrests are thick, rounded, and padded, providing comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The legs are slim, straight, and positioned at the corners, giving the piece a slightly elevated stance. The upholstery appears to have subtle diamond-patterned stitching on the front panel, adding a touch of visual interest. The overall construction suggests a sturdy frame with ample cushioning for both sitting and sleeping.
description: A modern convertible sofa bed with smooth upholstery, rounded padded armrests, and slim corner legs. It features two loose back cushions and a pull-out sleeping surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sofa in both seated and extended bed positions, highlighting the two back cushions and diamond-stitched front panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the armrests and the full extension of the bed surface.
description_view_2: Rear and top-down view showing the back panel and the arrangement of the cushions on the extended bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the sofa's depth, armrest profile, and the transition between sofa and bed modes.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, rectangular back cushions and a single, uniform seat cushion; cushions are visually uniform in size and shape, with the seat extending to form a bed.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, rounded, and padded armrests at both ends, extending slightly above seat height with a smooth, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight legs positioned at the corners, likely metal with a dark finish, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose cushions; the backrest is continuous and unadorned, providing a clean, modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with subtle diamond-patterned stitching on the front panel; overall upholstery is smooth and matte with minimal visible texture.
